research_question: Does poor nutritional condition promote high-risk behaviours in animals?

population.name: Population
exclude: studies on domesticated livestock with no wild-type parallels

exposure.name: Exposure
include: food restriction, fasting, or caloric deficit
poor nutritional condition (low body condition index)
exclude: pharmacological appetite suppression without nutritional manipulation

outcome.name: Outcome
exclude: physiological stress markers without behavioural outcome

study_design_include: observational field studies with nutritional manipulation
